title: leucas ebracteata var. kaokoveldensis
intro: Leucas ebracteata var. kaokoveldensis, also known as Kaokoveld leucas, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to southern Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. In traditional herbal preparations, Kaokoveld leucas is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
